content.en:
And as Ye Tian continued to slaughter those demon seeds, the high-level realm gods of the Beixun Realm were shocked one by one.

Especially the gods of the Longshan Realm, the surprise in their hearts was indescribable.

At this moment, he was also sure that the Guya Realm God had not boasted before, and the Ye Heaven Realm God was really able to reverse the situation in the Beixun Realm Seam Realm with his own strength.

Although the Northern Xun Boundary needs to give a large amount of resources to the Eastern Wu Boundary, as long as the Northern Xun Boundary Rift is stabilized, the resources paid can still be within the affordable range.

If the Gap of the Northern Xun Realm completely falls, and a large number of mid-level realm gods fall, then the loss is really big!

......

Another period of time has passed.

At this time, the situation in the Gap Realm of the Northern Xun Realm had been completely stabilized, and those demon seeds had besieged and attacked Ye Tian many times, but they were unsuccessful, so they gave up completely, and did not dare to send a large number of demon seeds to deal with Ye Tian's "Four Nine Zero", otherwise more demon seeds would fall, and it would be too much of a loss.

Gradually, the number of demons in the Gap of the Northern Xun Realm is scarce, and even if they see the Realm Gods, they will quickly flee away without meeting the Realm Gods, so as to reduce their losses.

In such a situation, the Northern Xun Boundary Rift naturally does not need any more support from the Eastern Wu Realm.

As a result, the realm gods who came to support the Dongwu realm were invited out by the realm gods of the Beixun realm.

Otherwise, if the realm gods of the Eastern Wu Realm continue to stay in the Beixun Boundary Rift Realm, they will obtain more resources, and these resources belong to the top forces of the Beixun Realm!

Of course.

Ye Tian was not invited out, the top forces in the Northern Xun Realm still needed Ye Tian, if Ye Tian was here, at least he could ensure the safety of the Beixun Realm.

However, if Ye Tian wanted to stay in the Boundary of the Northern Xun Boundary Gap forever, it was obviously impossible.

As long as it was stable for a long time, they would not allow Ye Tian to stay in the Boundary of the Northern Xun Boundary.

Otherwise, with Ye Tian's strength, it is enough to sweep the realm of the Beixun Realm, then a lot of resources will be taken away by Ye Tian alone, how can other realm gods snatch resources?

Really.

As the long years have passed, the demon seeds in the North Xun Boundary Rift still have no reinforcements.

As a result, the Longshan Realm God of the Northern Xun Realm found Ye Tian.

"Ye Tian Realm God, this is the end of our cooperation with the Dongwu Realm, you can leave the Gap Realm of the Northern Xun Realm!" said the Longshan Realm God.

"Good!"

Ye Tian didn't say anything, and directly chose to leave.

He is not the realm god of the Northern Xun Realm, there is no power to speak of here, and his strength cannot fight against these top forces.

Besides, he had already received enough benefits and resources to leave.

If he continued to forcibly not leave, he would undoubtedly offend the top forces in the Northern Xun Realm, which would not do him any good.

Soon.

Ye Tian left from the Gap Realm of the Northern Xun Realm.

......

Not long after Ye Tian returned to the Dongwu Realm, he received a summons from the Guya Realm God, asking him to go to the Dongwu Ancient Sect to receive reward resources.

So, Ye Tian soon came to the Dongwu Ancient Sect.

After a while, he met the god of the Ancient Realm.

At this time, with a wave of his hand, the god of the Guya Realm took out a large amount of Black Leaf Demon Gold.

In addition to this, there are several other resources.

"Ye Tianjie God, this is the Black Leaf Demon Gold given to you according to the agreement, and the Beixun Realm has already settled it for me, and now it will all be given to you. And these resources are also the rewards we have decided to give you!" said the Guya Realm God.

Ye Tian was not polite at all, and directly took away these resources.

"Guya Realm God, then you're welcome!"

Ye Tian smiled.

At this time, the Guya Realm God said again: "Ye Tian Realm God, the Beixun Realm God also said that if there is still trouble in the Beixun Realm Seam Realm, I hope you can go over to help, and they will give a little benefit." "

"No problem!"

After that, Ye Tian chatted with the gods of the Guya Realm for a while, and then they separated.

......

Terran Holy Country.

Ye Tian came back, and then he began to practice penance.

This time, he obtained a large amount of Black Leaf Demon Gold, which was likely enough for him to raise the Eternal Dao Seed to the limit. []

Therefore, he must ascend his eternal path seed as soon as possible.

So, in the following years, he continued to extract the origin of the Black Leaf Demon Gold to refine the Eternal Dao Seed, and the Eternal Dao Seed slowly became stronger.

Unconsciously, the 50 billion Dao Era years have passed.

After such a long time, Ye Tian gradually ran out of Black Leaf Demon Gold, but his Eternal Dao Seed still hadn't been raised to the current limit of 0 .....

Of course, he could also go to the high-level realm god realm now, but he didn't want to break through now, he had to raise his eternal Dao seed to the limit and then break through the realm.

After all, there is no need for him to rush so much time that he can't break through to the limit.

Maybe the impact of the breakthrough now is not too great, and the strength is only slightly weaker, but every realm doesn't care about this increase, and the strength will be weakened a lot in the later stage.

The reason why he can still cross the great realm to face the enemy now is that every realm has reached the limit, which is incomparable to his son.

Therefore, his combat strength of the same rank far surpassed that of his son Ye Xingchen.

......

"The Black Leaf Demon Gold has been exhausted, and it is still a little close, we have to collect some Black Leaf Demon Gold again!"

Ye Tian muttered.

So, he continued to collect the Black Leaf Demon Gold.

While asking the Terran Saint Country Chamber of Commerce to collect it, he also asked some high-level realm gods to buy it.

He is now very vocal in the Dongwu Realm domain, so many high-level realm gods are also willing to befriend him, and it is naturally not a problem for him to ask these high-level realm gods to purchase the Black Leaf Demon Gold.

Moreover, he is also willing to give a lot of resources, which is enough to make the high-level realm gods excited.

In terms of wealth, he was now much richer than many high-level realm gods.

After all, he killed a lot of high-level demon seeds and a large number of middle-level demon seeds in the realm of the Eastern Wu Realm and the 5.9 realm of the Northern Xun Realm, and many high-level demon seeds also carried all the resources and treasures, so they naturally fell into his hands.

This also caused his wealth to be extremely amazing, if it weren't for the fact that many resources were not suitable for high-level realm gods, only for high-level demon species, otherwise his wealth and net worth would be more than ten times higher than that of ordinary high-level realm gods.

Not long after Ye Tian paid a big price to purchase the Black Leaf Demon Gold, one by one the Black Leaf Demon Gold was successfully purchased and then sent to Ye Tian's hands.

In this way, Ye Tian had gathered the Black Leaf Demon Gold he needed, which was enough to raise his Eternal Dao Seed to the limit.

Of course, he will continue to buy Black Leaf Demon Gold, even if he doesn't need it in the future, his wife and children will need it!

So, this kind of black leaf magic gold, how much he acquired.
